subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Hearken unto the Call of the Wronged One from this well-known spot. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد ان استمع ندآء المظلوم منهذا المقر المعلوم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
